page: Google Cloud Platform m3-ultramem-64 is a memory-optimized server instance designed for memory-intensive workloads. It features 64 vCPUs mapped to 32 physical Intel Xeon cores running at 2.6 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The instance is equipped with 1952 GB of dedicated system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 30.5 GB per vCPU. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs.

Benchmark data indicates strong multi-core processing capabilities, with top-tier performance in multi-core stress-ng, Geekbench multi-core, and Passmark CPU tests. It demonstrates high throughput in static web serving and database operations, alongside strong performance in software compilation and cryptographic execution. Single-core performance and memory bandwidth benchmarks fall within the average range.

Given its massive memory allocation relative to compute cores, this instance offers high resource density for workloads requiring large in-memory datasets. It is highly suitable for large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise resource planning systems, heavy database operations, and memory-bound data processing tasks where storage can be attached externally.
description: Google Cloud Platform m3-ultramem-64 is a memory-optimized server instance featuring 64 vCPUs and 1952 GB of RAM, powered by an Intel Xeon processor running at 2.6 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. With 32 physical cores and a high memory-to-core ratio of 30.5 GB per vCPU, this instance is engineered for memory-intensive applications. It does not include local storage or GPUs. Benchmark results show strong multi-core CPU performance, high database operation throughput, and strong software compilation capabilities, while single-core metrics and memory bandwidth remain average. This configuration is highly efficient for workloads requiring massive memory capacity relative to compute resources, making it an appropriate fit for large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise applications, and complex data processing tasks.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform m3-ultramem-64 is a memory-optimized server featuring 64 Intel Xeon vCPUs and 1952 GB of RAM, delivering strong multi-core and database performance for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.
